3006440.name: Aeronesia
3006440.description:
Description




Following a bizarre incident, you find yourself trapped in a barely habitable world of floating continents. You're not the first to end up here - over the centuries, hundreds of other people have been transported into Aeronesia as well with nothing more than the items they had on them at the time. And in a world without food, equipment, and law... those other people may be more of a threat than any other danger you might face.

You're not trying to save this world, you're trying to leave it.

Main Features


Aeronesia is a non-linear platform RPG with heavy emphasis on:

  • Exploration, player freedom, and worldbuilding
  • Quest-based progression, with the player deciding whether and how to approach the tasks they're given
  • Combat featuring melee weapons and firearms, as well as traps and thrown items
  • Character customization through equipment and perks
  • Dialogue with varying outcomes and a choice of factions to work for or against
  • Factions, locations and phenomena whose history and nature you discover over time
  • Detailed pixel art graphics and animations
  • Dark humour
